race.comment: LATIBULATE (6) only got going late on debut here two weeks ago, closing off nicely into fourth. Has had a trial in-between and keeps Pannell. Bold showing anticipated. PAGANINI (1) finds it tough to break through but has runs littered through his form that would prove good enough to break through this time, none better than last start here when missing the bob. Strips rock-hard fit and deserves strong consideration. REGIMENTED (7) caught the eye on debut here when doing his best work late to finish sixth. Improved last time when racing on speed and only missing by a lip. Drawn less kindly on the quick back-up, so it'll be interesting to see what they do from out there. BAY ROAD BOY (4) trialled well prior to his debut but failed to live up to expectation. Willing to give another go with Holder sticking but he will need to be on top of his game from out there.
